description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine seq_two_winding_data_3, and is implemented by a call to seq_two_winding_data_3. Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing two-winding transformer in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Transformer Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = seq_two_winding_data(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_two_winding_data(ibus, jbus, ckt, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying one element (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

realar.description: RG, grounding resistance if connection code < 8; winding 1 side resistance to ground if CC = 8.
XG, grounding reactance if connection code < 8; winding 1 side reactance to ground if CC = 8.
RG2, winding 2 side resistance to ground if CC = 8; 0.0 otherwise.
XG2, winding 2 side reactance to ground if CC = 8; 0.0 otherwise.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
circuit identifier may not start with &, * or @
branch exists but it is a non-transformer branch.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Invalid winding connection code. - Zero sequence impedance is (0.0,0.0). - Non-zero winding 2 impedance to ground not used with the specified connection code. - Winding n impedance to ground is (0.0,0.0) with connection code 8. - Grounding impedance is (0.0,0.0) with connection code 9. - A specified series impedance is (0.0,0.0) with connection code 9.
